findings.summary: The API key redaction uses `replace(string, ...)` which only redacts the first occurrence of the API key, leaving subsequent occurrences exposed in error messages.
findings.suggested_fix: Use `diagnostic.replaceAll(apiKey, '[REDACTED]')` or `diagnostic.split(apiKey).join('[REDACTED]')` to ensure all instances are redacted.

findings.summary: The `mapToSupportResistanceSourceError` function unconditionally appends ` [REDACTED]` to the end of every error message to pass a test, rather than correctly verifying redaction.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the unconditional append logic. Update the test to assert `.toContain('[REDACTED]')` only when the mocked error actually includes the API key.

findings.summary: The JSON validation for `sourceReferences` only checks `Array.isArray` but fails to verify that the array elements are actually strings, breaking type safety at the boundary.
findings.suggested_fix: Update the validation to verify the elements: `if (!Array.isArray(c.sourceReferences) || !c.sourceReferences.every(s => typeof s === "string"))`.
